# AI Disclosure: this was mostly generated by AI, as it serves only to link the appropriate libraries.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)
project(BGPStreamApp CXX)

set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# 1. Automatically detect Homebrew's location (Works for Intel & Apple Silicon)
if(APPLE)
    execute_process(COMMAND brew --prefix OUTPUT_VARIABLE BREW_PREFIX OUTPUT_STRIP_TRAILING_WHITESPACE)
    set(SEARCH_PATHS ${BREW_PREFIX} "/usr/local" "/usr")
else()
    set(SEARCH_PATHS "/usr/local" "/usr")
endif()

# 2. Find the BGPStream Header
find_path(BGPSTREAM_INCLUDE_DIR 
    NAMES bgpstream.h 
    PATHS ${SEARCH_PATHS} 
    PATH_SUFFIXES include
)

# 3. Find the Libraries (BGPStream AND its required dependency: Wandio)
find_library(BGPSTREAM_LIB NAMES bgpstream PATHS ${SEARCH_PATHS} PATH_SUFFIXES lib)
find_library(WANDIO_LIB NAMES wandio PATHS ${SEARCH_PATHS} PATH_SUFFIXES lib)

# 4. Error checking
if(NOT BGPSTREAM_INCLUDE_DIR OR NOT BGPSTREAM_LIB)
    message(FATAL_ERROR "BGPStream not found! Paths searched: ${SEARCH_PATHS}")
endif()

if(NOT WANDIO_LIB)
    message(WARNING "libwandio not found. Linkage might fail if BGPStream was built with it.")
endif()

# 5. Build the Executable
add_executable(my_bgp_app main.cpp)

# 6. Link everything
target_include_directories(my_bgp_app PRIVATE ${BGPSTREAM_INCLUDE_DIR})
target_link_libraries(my_bgp_app PRIVATE ${BGPSTREAM_LIB} ${WANDIO_LIB})

# 7. Print status so you can see it working
message(STATUS "Found BGPStream: ${BGPSTREAM_LIB}")
message(STATUS "Found Headers: ${BGPSTREAM_INCLUDE_DIR}")
